title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Zensar Technologies

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Zensar Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Zensar Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Zensar Technologies:
Zensar Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zensar Technologies!
